name: Bogey Master Golf Simulator
about: Bogey Master is Hutto's first 24/7 indoor golf lounge, founded by local golf enthusiasts. It features Trackman-powered bays designed for golfers of all ages and skill levels, offering an environment to practice, compete, or unwind day or night. The venue provides a premium, accessible golf experience with a social atmosphere, encouraging patrons to bring their own food and drinks while enjoying world-famous courses and data-driven swing analysis.
why_golfers_like_it: Trackman-powered technology provides professional-grade data and simulation quality
24/7 access allows for flexible scheduling around busy lifestyles
BYOB policy and adjacent brewery create a relaxed, social golf experience
Supports all skill levels with customizable settings and practice tools
Online booking system with secure access codes for convenience

food_and_drink.notes: Patrons can bring their own food to enjoy during their session
BYOB policy is allowed, with Power Brewing brewery located next door for convenient purchase

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar-based launch monitor powering all simulation bays

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own clubs to play at Bogey Master.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Absolutely. Bogey Master operates on a BYOB policy, and you can also purchase drinks from Power Brewing next door.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: You can play 18 holes in just a few hours, making it perfect for busy schedules.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Bogey Master is for everyone! Whether you're a first-timer or a scratch golfer, the bays are designed to be fun and accessible for all skill levels.
